security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* data: blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ipc: http://ipc.localhost https:; worker-src 'self' blob:; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Build sparse tile maps from GeoTIFFs
bundle.longDescription: Map Tile Studio by AiGeoLAB turns multiple GeoTIFF images into a single, integrated, sparse tile map. Empty areas produce no blank tiles.
